title: verbascum × lobulatum
intro: Verbascum × lobulatum, also known as the Micky Mouse plant, is a hybrid of the Verbascum phoeniceum and Verbascum virgatum species, characterized by its unique, large, yellow flowers with a distinctive shape. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Verbascum × lobulatum include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation, making it a popular herb in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Verbascum × lobulatum can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
